feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RELATÓRIO DO RAZÃO
entry.content:
Olá a todos.

Estou tentando gerar um relatório semestral do Razão contabil e sempre que tento gerar em PDF não termina a geração completa e o SAP (conexão em máquina virtual) simplesmente cai.
Não aparece nenhuma mensagem na tela e nem algum erro na conexão remota.
Acredito que é pela quantidade dos dados contidos no relatório.
Alguém passou por situação parecida?

Obrigado.

#sapb1 #sapbunissesone #razao #generalledger

entry.title: Data Table - invalid Unique Id [66000-138] while inspecting CFL SelectedObjects
entry.content:
After migrating customer's servers from SAP9.3 PL12 to SAP 10 2402 (through 2208) our addon started giving back an exception when accessing any property of SelectedObjects from ChooseFromListEvent

 

System.Runtime.InteropServices.COMException (0xFFFFE1B3): Data Table - invalid Unique Id  [66000-138]
   bei SAPbouiCOM.DataTableClass.get_IsEmpty()

 

on line where I use cflEvent.SelectedObjects.IsEmpty, like in code sample:

 

public bool ProcessItemEvent(string FormUID, ref SAPbouiCOM.ItemEvent pVal)
{
	if (pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_CHOOSE_FROM_LIST && !pVal.BeforeAction && pVal.ActionSuccess && pVal.ItemUID == "edBP") {
		var oForm = GetForm(FormUID);

		SAPbouiCOM.ChooseFromListEvent cflEvent = pVal as SAPbouiCOM.ChooseFromListEvent;
		SAPbouiCOM.Grid grid = SAPUtils.GetControl<SAPbouiCOM.Grid>(oForm, "gRLZ");
			

		if (!cflEvent.SelectedObjects.IsEmpty)
		{
			SetCardName(oForm, cflEvent.SelectedObjects.GetValue("CardName", 0).ToString());

 

 

 Dear experts, any ideas what should I do with this? It looks like a bug.

entry.title: GRPO With Approved Status. But appear with Reject Status in Approval Status Report
entry.content:
I have GRPO With Approved Status. But when I run the Approval Status Report I find it With a Reject Status

Can anyone help me to know the reason for that 

Because I can't cancel this GRPO or Even Copy it to the AP Invoice 

Thanks in Advanced

entry.title: Customização Formula de Imposto
entry.content:
Olá!

Estou passando por uma dificuldade no processo de cálculo de ICMS-ST na minha operação, veja se conseguem me auxiliar.

Trabalho em uma empresa onde somos substitutos tributários de ICMS-ST, logo o ICMS-ST é enquadrado como crédito no processo de aquisição de mercadorias, o que ocorre quando adquirimos mercadorias em que o imposto já foi pago.

Desta forma, quando o fornecedor nos efetua a venda, eles informam no XML o valor deste ICMS-ST pago, nas tags <vBCSTRet>, <vICMSSubstituto> e <vICMSSTRet>:

Com isso, preciso que o valor de 75,18 seja aplicado na fórmula de cálculo do ICMS-ST para creditar o valor na mercadoria. Portanto, quando efetuo a entrada da nota, esse valor será alocado em um campo personalizado, neste caso, U_vICMSSubstituto.

O problema é que não consigo utilizar este campo para calcular o imposto. Existe a possibilidade de utilizar um campo personalizado na fórmula de cálculo?

Basicamente, o valor do imposto deve ser igual ao campo customizado:

TaxAmt = U_vICMSSubstituto


Abraço a todos,

Diego Perilo Madeira

entry.title: After creating a Sales Order Draft via DI API system shows unexpected Discounts
entry.content:
I belive that automatic price rounding to 2 digits after decimal point happens, but somehow not for all lines.

This way is sales order draft created, without prices and discounts:

var draft = (Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(BoObjectTypes.oDrafts);

draft.DocObjectCode = BoObjectTypes.oOrders;
draft.CardCode = shoporder.CustomerCode;
draft.NumAtCard = shopOrder.OrderId;
draft.DocDueDate = shopOrder.DocDueDate;

var lines = draft.Lines;

foreach (var l in shopOrder.Lines)
{
if (lines.ItemCode != "")
lines.Add();

lines.ItemCode = l.ItemCode;
lines.Quantity = l.QuantityKart;
}

if (d.Add() == 0) {
draftEntry = int.Parse(oCompany.GetNewObjectKey());
} else
throw new Exception("Could not add draft");

//...

//later - adding draft as document
var draft = (Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(BoObjectTypes.oDrafts);

if (draft.GetByKey(draftEntry) && draft.SaveDraftToDocument() == 0) {
var addedDoc = int.Parse(oCompany.GetNewObjectKey());

var order = (Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(BoObjectTypes.oOrders);
if (!order.GetByKey(addedDoc))
throw new Exception("Added order could not be found");

In draft neither prices nor discounts are defined

SAP_ORDR_DRF.xml
Line 28: <DiscPrcnt nil="true">0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 528: <Price nil="true">0.000000</Price>
Line 531: <DiscPrcnt nil="true">0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 865: <Price nil="true">0.000000</Price>
Line 868: <DiscPrcnt nil="true">0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 1202: <Price nil="true">0.000000</Price>
Line 1205: <DiscPrcnt nil="true">0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 1539: <Price nil="true">0.000000</Price>
Line 1542: <DiscPrcnt nil="true">0.000000</DiscPrcnt>

But in sales order they are already filled

SAP_ORDR.xml
Line 28: <DiscPrcnt>0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 528: <Price>137.400000</Price>
Line 531: <DiscPrcnt>0.000000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 865: <Price>6.190000</Price>
Line 868: <DiscPrcnt>0.030000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 1202: <Price>17.090000</Price>
Line 1205: <DiscPrcnt>-0.010000</DiscPrcnt>
Line 1539: <Price>0.000000</Price>
Line 1542: <DiscPrcnt>0.000000</DiscPrcnt>

Correct price for both materials:

Material NumInSale Price PriceKart (Price * NumInSale)Discount
MAT0161.0326.1920
MAT02240.71217.0880

Is there any way to correct this behavior? Am I missing any settings?

UPDATE: If I create sales order directly, ommitting the draft part, no price rounding and therefore no discounts occure. But I need to use drafts.

entry.title: Approval query for expired batch in delivery screen
entry.content: Does anyone have the expired batch approval query for  delivery transaction screen?

entry.title: How to Connect SAP B1 Calendar to Outlook 365 Calendar
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there anyway to connect a user's SAP Calendar to the Microsoft Outlook 365 calendar? The Boyum CRM for Outlook extension does not work with O365.

https://support.boyum-it.com/hc/en-us/articles/213748277-CRM-for-Outlook-FAQ

Thank you for your time,

entry.title: Must specify table to select from in Exec saved procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on SAP B1 10 , SQL 2017

When I execute this Query : 

DECLARE @M1 AS varchar(10)
SET @M1 = '20240301'
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

It runs OK ; But when I try to use parameters Like this :

--SELECT * FROM OIGE T0 WHERE T0.[DocDate] = [%cs1]
DECLARE @M1 AS varchar(10)
SET @M1 = [%cs1]
Exec [dbo].[GIP_SIT_J] @M1
SELECT * FROM [dbo].[@GIP_SIT_J]

I get Error : Must Specify Table to Select From .....

Thanks for helping to solve this issue.

entry.title: Open GRPO Xml to be converted as AP Invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an Open GRPO in XML file, I want to import that XML file as AP Invoice.

Can you please tell me how I can do it?

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: A/R Credit Note uses incorrect price to affect Last Purchase Price and Moving Average
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently in our system, when posting an A/R Credit Note, item stock is returned with a value according to the sales price instead of according to the cost price at the moment of sales.

Example:

ItemPurchase PricePurchase QuantityTotalMoving Average
Doohickey1.001001001.00
Doohickey1.501001501.25
Doohickey2.001002001.50

Last Purchase Price 2.00, total stock value 450

When I sell 100 Doohickeys, I know it costs me 1.50/pcs. I put 100% margin on it, and sell it for 3.00/pcs. My total margin is 150 and the value of my left over stock is 300.

When my customer returns the 100 Doohickeys, I pay back 150, and my stock value increases by 150

ItemCN priceReturned QuantityTotalMoving Average
Doohickey  previous1.50
Doohickey3.001003002.00

Now Last Purchase Price is 3.00 and total stock value is 600.

For all intents and purposes both the Last Purchase Price and Moving Average are incorrect.

My question is, is my reasoning flawed or is this system behavior wrong or is this a matter of a setting somewhere?

Regards,

Johan

EDIT: this system behavior only happens when the Credit Note is not based on a source transaction.

entry.title: Changing career from B1 specialist to S/4HANA
entry.content: I have 15 years of experience in SAP business one as power user as I was a VP of a medium organization but I find the opportunities limited in terms of size of organizations and salary in comparison to SAP s/4HANA. Looking for suggestions such as I have some experience with course work in SAP Supply chain management in ECC, but I spent the majority of my time in Business one in the finance side of the things with a focus on marketing documents we would call it  (A/R and A/P invoices). I did various system upgrade in business one along with process and query optimizations.

entry.title: FMS in Item Master Data displays wrong data in Query report
entry.content:
Hi,

An FMS is set up on a UDF on Item Master Data to update regularly. However, the update is not reflected in the query report.

Can you please advise? Thank you.

entry.title: Busca de pedido de venda pela data de cancelamento / Sales order search by cancellation date.
entry.content:
Bom dia Pessoal,

Estou montando uma query para uma relatório para exibir os pedidos cancelados, e a premissa seria a busca pela data de cancelamento do pedido.

No caso no SAP B1, nas tabelas envolvendo a ORDR e suas filhas, não possuem a informação da data do cancelamento do pedido, porem encontro ela na tabela ADOC (de logs), quando o updatedate é referente a alteração da coluna CANCELED para Y.

Alguém já conseguiu fazer um relatório/query que busque pela data de cancelamento ou conseguiu contornar de alguma forma, para que fosse possível fazer a busca por essa data?

Atenciosamente,
Vinicius Dezan.

 

In English:

Good morning,

I'm putting together a query for a report to display canceled orders, and the premise would be to search for the order cancellation date.

In the case of SAP B1, the tables involving the ORDR and its children do not have information on the order cancellation date, but I can find it in the ADOC table (logs), when the updatedate refers to the change of the CANCELED column to Y.

Has anyone managed to create a report/query that searches for the cancellation date or managed to get around it in some way, so that it would be possible to search for that date?

Yours sincerely,
Vinicius Dezan.

entry.title: Approval Process
entry.content:
Hi

   I have an approval , if the document has been approved user is still able to resend again for approval. We want to block it. How it can be done through Stored Procedure or some other way.

Regards

entry.title: How to create API to consume SAP B1 Service Layer in SAP BTP ?!!
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

I have created a destination on my SAP BTP account.

To consume the SAP Business One Service Layer, I need to create an API where I will route to my destination.

Any help Please? 😣

entry.title: FMS not working correctly
entry.content:
Hello Experts,


I have created an FMS to populated a UDF at row level in Purchase Order from a UDF in Item Master Data. Auto-refresh is set to REGULARLY on EXITING ALTERED COLUMN. The FMS works correctly and I am able to see the UDF getting populated at Purchase Order row level. However, the issue is that the value at backend table is not getting updated and is showing the old value only. Please help.

Best Regards,

Abhishek.

entry.title: SAP B1 - Year end BC JNL reversed in the wrong period
entry.content:
Hi there,

We encountered an issue with a BC JNL reversed in the wrong period. In December 2022, a JNL for Corp Tax was posted and then the Year End was run. As usual, SAP posted a BC JNL on December 31, 2022, to zero out the Corp Tax account and transfer the balance to RE.

A user mistakenly reversed that last JNL, but instead of reversing it in December 2022, they reversed it in January 2023. Since it is a BC JNL, I cannot amend the reversal by adding a duplicate JNL (if attempted, it is posted as a normal JNL). Consequently, when running the PL & TB, the amounts do not match as the BC journals are not taken into account. I tried posting a dummy JNL in January for that amount, but it was unsuccessful.

Does anyone have a solution for this?

 Thanks

entry.title: How do I obtain the oOrders.Lines.VisualOrder property after adding a new order line DI API
entry.content:
I am adding a new order line ( AR Sales order - Item type)  and updating it.

I need to obtain the newly added line ( Lines.VisualOrder ) as soon as I have added.

I would prefer to do this without having to do a SQL query.  Any tips are appreciated.

entry.title: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content:
Dear Community, I am trying to find out delivery date for each Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement). Following is the sql query that I created but it does not give correct results. Please help.

 

WITH DeliveryDates AS (
   SELECT
       OOAT."StartDate",
       OOAT."EndDate",
       OOAT."BpName",
   OOAT."Project",
       OITM."ItemCode",
       OITM."ItemName",
       OAT2."DatePeriod",
       OAT2."Quantity",
       OAT1."PlanQty",
       OAT1."CumQty",
   (Select Sum(RDR1.OpenQty) from RDR1 Where RDR1.AgrNo = OOAT.[AbsID] and RDR1.ItemCode = OAT1.ItemCode) [SO_QTY],
    OAT1.[CumQty]+(Select Sum(RDR1.OpenQty) from RDR1 Where RDR1.AgrNo = OOAT.[AbsID] and RDR1.ItemCode = OAT1.ItemCode)[CumQty_Includ_SO],
       CASE
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'M' THEN DATEADD(MONTH, 1 / DATEDIFF(DAY, OOAT."StartDate", OOAT."EndDate"), OAT2."FromDate")
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'A' THEN DATEADD(YEAR, 1 / DATEDIFF(DAY, OOAT."StartDate", OOAT."EndDate"), OAT2."FromDate")
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'O' THEN OAT2."FromDate"
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'W' THEN DATEADD(WEEK, 1 / DATEDIFF(DAY, OOAT."StartDate", OOAT."EndDate"), OAT2."FromDate")
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'Q' THEN DATEADD(QUARTER, 3 / DATEDIFF(DAY, OOAT."StartDate", OOAT."EndDate"), OAT2."FromDate")
           WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'S' THEN DATEADD(MONTH, 6 / DATEDIFF(DAY, OOAT."StartDate", OOAT."EndDate"), OAT2."FromDate")
       END AS "DeliveryDate"
   FROM
       OOAT
   INNER JOIN OAT1 ON OOAT."AbsID" = OAT1."AgrNo"
   INNER JOIN OAT2 ON OAT1."AgrNo" = OAT2."AgrNo" AND OAT2."AgrLnNum" = OAT1."AgrLineNum"
   INNER JOIN OITM ON OAT1."ItemCode" = OITM."ItemCode"
 
   WHERE
       OAT2."FromDate" BETWEEN OOAT."StartDate" AND OOAT."EndDate"
)
SELECT *
FROM DeliveryDates;

entry.title: Orientación sobre el proceso, configuración y facturación de alquileres de equipos con series
entry.content: Saludos. Estamos haciendo unas pruebas ya que esto lo estamos realizando con el fin de poder darle seguimiento a los equipos que alquilamos con serie y que se le deben facturar piezas que no se le cobran al cliente, Nuestro inconveniente es, si yo tengo un equipo con serie y quiero facturar este mes el alquiler de ese equipo y el mantenimiento que se le hizo, como puedo yo hacer en el sistema conjunto con la tarjeta de equipo y el siguiente mes el sepa que le voy a facturar al mismo equipo con la misma serie? Necesitamos apoyo.
